query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.priority, p.sector, p.projectState, p.productLane, 
  DATE(p.createdAt) AS addedDate,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 END) AS srCount
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.name
WHERE p.createdAt >= '2026-05-12 00:00:00'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
GROUP BY p.id
HAVING srCount >= 1
ORDER BY p.createdAt ASC;

  DATE(p.createdAt) AS addedDate,

FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.name
WHERE p.createdAt >= '2026-05-12 00:00:00'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
GROUP BY p.id
HAVING srCount >= 1
